reasoning: The main limiter for you is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Your last ride showed moderate intensity, but we need structured efforts. Addressing this with a focus on over-unders will better prepare you for the sustained efforts needed at Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x12 min over-unders: 4 min at 218W, 2 min at 256W, 4 min at 218W, 2 min at 256W.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
